headline: KEEP YOUR LICENCE CURRENT
subheading: Classify every MIA and WDA change correctly, build defensible evidence and sequence submissions to avoid MHRA findings.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial composition evoking the controlled amendment of a pharmaceutical manufacturing licence: a stylised official document with a precise embossed seal at its centre, its layered pages subtly lifting and realigning to show a scope being updated under control. Fine translucent grid lines and connecting nodes flow across the surface like a change-control pathway, branching into two distinct routes to suggest administrative versus standard variation classification. Crisp geometric checkmark and shield motifs float as glowing accents, conveying scrutiny passed and authorisation secured. A faint glass-walled facility silhouette glows in the deep background. The palette is deep navy base layered with luminous teal and cyan light, lifted by a single subtle fresh-green accent marking an approved tab. Polished surfaces, soft volumetric depth, shallow focus with elegant bokeh, premium clinical-luxury mood. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
